ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rental_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of bicycles the station can hold */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the station's location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the station's location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the station */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bicycles" (
  "bicycle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bicycle */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the bicycle is located */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the bicycle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the bicycle */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the bicycle */,
  "rental_price_per_hour" TEXT /* Rental price per hour of the bicycle */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of bicycle (e.g., road, mountain, hybrid) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the bicycle (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bicycle (e.g., available, rented, in_maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bicycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bicycles_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES rental_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rentals" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental */,
  "bicycle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bicycle rented */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rented the bicycle */,
  "rental_date" TEXT /* Date and time the bicycle was rented */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date and time the bicycle was returned */,
  "duration_in_hours" INTEGER /* Duration of the rental in hours */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the rental */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the rental (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_bicycle_id FOREIGN KEY ("bicycle_id") REFERENCES bicycles ("bicycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff, customer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rental associated with the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, paid, refunded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_rental_id FOREIGN KEY ("rental_id") REFERENCES rentals ("rental_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "instant" INTEGER /* Instant of the weather record */,
  "dteday" TEXT /* Date of the weather record */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season of the weather record */,
  "yr" INTEGER /* Year of the weather record */,
  "mnth" INTEGER /* Month of the weather record */,
  "holiday" INTEGER /* Holiday indicator */,
  "weekday" INTEGER /* Day of the week */,
  "workingday" INTEGER /* Working day indicator */,
  "weathersit" INTEGER /* Weather situation */,
  "temp" REAL /* Temperature */,
  "hum" REAL /* Humidity */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Wind speed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rental_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental history record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rented the bicycle */,
  "bicycle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bicycle rented */,
  "rental_date" TEXT /* Date and time the bicycle was rented */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date and time the bicycle was returned */,
  "duration_in_hours" INTEGER /* Duration of the rental in hours */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the rental */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_history_bicycle_id FOREIGN KEY ("bicycle_id") REFERENCES bicycles ("bicycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "bicycle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bicycle maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_bicycle_id FOREIGN KEY ("bicycle_id") REFERENCES bicycles ("bicycle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)
